title: verbascum apiculatum
intro: Verbascum apiculatum, also known as the Chinese mullein or mullein, is a biennial plant species native to China and other parts of Asia, characterized by its yellow flowers and velvety leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Verbascum apiculatum include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
